  ---
name: Task
description: A general task or work item.
title: "[TASK] - "
labels: task
assignees: 
---

**Task Description**
What needs to be done?

**Acceptance Criteria**
How will we know this task is complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

**Related Issues**
Are there related issues or PRs?
- Related to #
- Blocks #
- Depends on #

**Priority**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocks other work
- [ ] 🟠 High - Should be done soon
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Normal priority
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Nice to have
